en: Tragically, this is based on your life. I mean, this is things...
ko: 슬프게도 이건 당신의 실제 이야기에서 따온 거잖아요. 실제로 있었던 일이에요.

en: Yeah, but... I mean... LAUGHTER
Loosely, Graham.
No, but things like, isn't the washing machine, that happened to you. What?
ko: 아니, 하지만 세탁기 같은 건 실제로 당신한테 일어난 일이잖아. 뭐라고?

en: The washing. You were very hungover. Oh. Yeah.
LAUGHTER
Tell Tony Foster that story.
All their stories are really cool, though, Graham.
ko: 근데 그레이엄, 그 이야기들 다 진짜 재밌긴 해.

en: When I was teaching, which is what this show is based on,
ko: 그레이엄, 내가 교사로 일할 때, 이 쇼가 바로 그때 이야기를 바탕으로 한 건데,

en: I went home one weekend and I was in my 30s.
ko: 어느 주말에 집에 갔었어. 그때 나는 30대였고.

en: I was probably 33 years of age.
ko: 아마 33살이었을 거야. 어머니를 만나러 집에 갔었는데,

en: I went home to see my mother and then I went back.
ko: 어머니를 만나러 집에 갔다가 다시 돌아왔어.

en: And while I was at home, my mother did my washing for me because I was only 33. And then I went back.
ko: 집에 있는 동안 어머니가 빨래를 해주셨어.

en: On the Sunday night, I got really drunk
and then I went for a curry.
And then the next day I went into school. I'm going to.
I went into school and it was a school in Slough and it was quite a rough school, but they had a really brilliant hearing impaired department.
So there were hearing impaired kids who, you know, struggled.
ko: 그래서 청각 장애가 있는 아이들이 있었는데, 좀 힘들어하는 애들이었어.

en: They were really looked after in the school. Anyway, I was really hungover.
ko: 학교에서 잘 돌봐주긴 했어. 어쨌든, 나는 숙취가 심했어.

en: I went there and about break time I felt really uncomfortable. I thought something's not right, you know.
ko: 학교에 갔는데 쉬는 시간쯤 되니까 뭔가 불편한 거야. 뭔가 이상하다 싶었어.

en: So I went to the toilet
and I pulled my trousers down and
some of my mother knickers had got LAUGHTER I got mixed up in the wash she done And I was wearing my mother underwear And I went oh God oh no
ko: 어머니 속옷이 빨래할 때 섞인 거야. 그래서 나는 어머니 속옷을 입고 있었던 거지. '세상에, 안 돼' 이러고.

en: Oh, I remember going, oh, you loser, this is...
ko: 아, 기억나, '아, 이 패배자야, 이건...' 이랬어.

en: Such a low point, you fucking loser.
And then...
And then the curry and the booze...
The curry and the booze kicked in from the night before.
ko: 전날 밤에 먹은 카레랑 술이 효과를 발휘하기 시작한 거야.

en: So I did like a fecal Jackson Pollock.
ko: 그래서 잭슨 폴록 급의 똥 작품을 만들어 버렸어.

en: And I started going,
Oh, God, not this! Not this as well! Oh, Jesus!
So I cleaned myself up and I pulled my mother's pants back up.
ko: 그래서 닦고, 어머니 속옷을 다시 올렸어.

en: And I went back into the classroom
and I saw one of the hearing-impaired kids just looking at me like this.
ko: 청각 장애 아이 한 명이 이렇게 나를 쳐다보고 있는 거야.

en: And that's when I remembered that I had a microphone directly.
ko: 그때야 마이크를 달고 있었다는 걸 기억했어.

en: LAUGHTER AND APPLAUSE
Too easy. Here we go.
LAUGHTER AND APPLAUSE
So maybe Mandown isn't that far-fetched.
LAUGHTER AND APPLAUSE
MUSIC PLAYS
There you go. Oh!
You know, like that.
And then I... Well, his belly went in my mouth.
ko: 그러고 나서 나... 걔 배가 내 입에 들어왔어.
